The '''''Dalliance''''' was a modified [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighter]] owned by the [[New Jedi Order]]. It was housed at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==History==
[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]] flew the ''Dalliance'' on their mission to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. The two Jedi were investigating the disappearance of a class of [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologists]] from the [[University of Agamar]].

It turned out there was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence on the world, and in an attempt to rescue some of the students captured by Yuuzhan Vong, Corran Horn was captured. Flying the ''Dalliance'', Ganner rescued Corran and also flew the archaeologists off Bimmiel, along with the remains of a Yuuzhan Vong forward scout [[Mongei Shai]] they had found there.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
